assertions.summary: Canonical entrypoints and the previously failing active platform packet now use `orchestrator-erp` for current repo/product identity. The only old-name occurrence found in the checked canonical docs is `docs/platform/config-feature-toggles.md:247`, where `BigBright ERP` is explicitly documented as a legacy literal default for `security.mfa.issuer` and contrasted with current `orchestrator-erp` branding, so it remains in an explicit legacy context rather than as current identity text.
